impact: Provides deterministic, reviewable public-source inputs for the PP&D crawler before any live crawl or authenticated DevHub automation, covering Portland.gov PP&D guidance, DevHub public references, PortlandOregon.gov account guidance, and Portland Maps public lookup references.
summary: Add public PP&D crawl seeds and crawler domain allowlist.
target_task: Task checkbox-3: Add public PP&D seed manifest and crawler allowlist for Portland.gov, DevHub, PortlandOregon.gov, and Portland Maps references.
